parameters.expression:
Snake_Checkpoint.GridX = SnakeHead.GridX + SnakeHead.dirX &
Snake_Checkpoint.GridY = SnakeHead.GridY + SnakeHead.dirY

parameters.value:
clamp(
        scrollx - (TouchCurrentMidX - PanLastX) / LayoutScale,
        -200 * LayoutScale,
        1300 * LayoutScale
    )

clamp(
        scrolly - (TouchCurrentMidY - PanLastY) / LayoutScale,
        100 * LayoutScale,
        2000 * LayoutScale
    )
